<!DOCTYPE html>

<link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 viewBox=%220 0 100 100%22><text y=%22.9em%22 font-size=%2290%22>✦</text></svg>" />

<!-- Fonts -->
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300;1,400;1,500&family=Cinzel:wght@400;500&family=Jost:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Noto+Sans+Arabic:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="md3-header.css?v=5" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="md3-home.css?v=10" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="md3-shop.css?v=11" />

<style>
  :root {
    --cream: #f8f5f0;
    --cream-deep: #f0f0f0;
    --sand: #eaeaea;
    --bone: #ffffff;
    --ink: #1a1a1a;
    --ink-soft: #666666;
    --wood: #b8946b;
    --gold: #1a1a1a;
    --gold-bright: #333333;
    --gold-soft: #eaeaea;
    --shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.06);
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', 'Jost', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--ink);
    background: var(--cream);
    line-height: 1.6;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }
  body.lang-ar {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Arabic', 'Jost', sans-serif;
  }
  /* Subtle paper texture */
  body::before {
    display: none;
  }

  .display { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; }

  html[dir="rtl"] .sub-list { text-align: right; }
  html[dir="rtl"] .collection-card.open .collection-link .chevron {
    transform: rotate(-90deg);
  }

  .eyebrow {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 18px;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.35em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    animation: fadeUp 1s ease both;
  }
  .eyebrow .line {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--gold);
  }

  h1.title {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: clamp(48px, 11vw, 96px);
    font-weight: 400;
    line-height: 1;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    max-width: 900px;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  h1.title em {
    font-style: italic;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--gold);
    display: block;
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  .tagline {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: clamp(16px, 4.2vw, 20px);
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    max-width: 540px;
    margin-bottom: 56px;
  }

  .cta-group {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 14px;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 420px;
  }

  .btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 20px 28px;
    background: var(--bone);
    border: 1px solid var(--sand);
    color: var(--ink);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    cursor: pointer;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.1), transparent);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    transition: transform 0.6s;
  }
  .btn:hover::before { transform: translateX(100%); }

  .btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--gold);
    color: var(--gold);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--ink);
    color: var(--cream);
    border-color: var(--ink);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover {
    background: var(--gold);
    border-color: var(--gold);
    color: var(--bone);
  }

  .btn .icon { font-size: 18px; }

  /* Sections */
  section {
    padding: 100px 24px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }
  section.featured-collection {
    padding: 0;
  }
  section.collections {
    padding-top: 56px;
  }
  .container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }

  .section-eyebrow {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.35em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
  }
  .section-eyebrow .line {
    width: 30px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--gold);
  }
  .section-eyebrow-link {
    color: inherit;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: opacity 0.2s;
  }
  .section-eyebrow-link:hover {
    opacity: 0.72;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: clamp(36px, 7vw, 56px);
    font-weight: 400;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 60px;
  }
  .section-title em {
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--gold);
  }

  /* Collections grid */
  .collections {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--cream) 0%, var(--cream-deep) 100%);
  }

  .collection-grid {
    display: grid;
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .collection-card {
    background: var(--bone);
    padding: 48px 32px;
    text-align: center;
    border: 1px solid rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.15);
    transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .collection-card::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 50%;
    width: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--gold);
    transition: all 0.5s ease;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
  }
  .collection-card:hover::after { width: 60%; }

  .collection-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
  }

  .collection-card--fashion {
    background: url('images/fashion-bg.png') center 32% / cover no-repeat;
    min-height: 480px;
    padding: 0;
    border: none;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .collection-card--fashion::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
      to top,
      rgba(28, 24, 20, 0.88) 0%,
      rgba(28, 24, 20, 0.45) 38%,
      rgba(28, 24, 20, 0.08) 62%,
      transparent 100%
    );
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .collection-card--fashion:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 48px rgba(43, 38, 32, 0.22);
  }

  .collection-card--fashion .collection-card-inner {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 36px 28px 40px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .collection-card--fashion h3 {
    color: var(--cream);
    text-shadow: 0 1px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
  }

  .collection-card p {
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .collection-card--fashion p {
    color: #d4af37;
    text-shadow: 0 1px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
  }

  .collection-card--fashion .collection-link {
    color: var(--cream);
    border-bottom-color: var(--gold);
  }

  .collection-card--has-bg {
    min-height: 420px;
    padding: 0;
    border: none;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: stretch;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .collection-card--has-bg::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
      to top,
      rgba(28, 24, 20, 0.88) 0%,
      rgba(28, 24, 20, 0.45) 38%,
      rgba(28, 24, 20, 0.08) 62%,
      transparent 100%
    );
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  .collection-card--has-bg > * {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .collection-card--has-bg:not(.collection-card--fashion) {
    padding: 36px 28px 40px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .collection-card--has-bg h3 {
    color: var(--cream);
    text-shadow: 0 1px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
  }

  .collection-card--has-bg p {
    color: #d4af37;
    text-shadow: 0 1px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
  }

  .collection-card--has-bg .collection-link {
    color: var(--cream);
    border-bottom-color: var(--gold);
  }

  .collection-card--has-bg .collection-icon {
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35));
  }

  .collection-icon {
    font-size: 36px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    display: block;
  }

  .collection-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .collection-link {
    color: var(--gold);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gold);
    padding-bottom: 4px;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .collection-link:hover { letter-spacing: 0.3em; }

  /* Subcategory dropdown */
  .subcategories {
    max-height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: max-height 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.4s ease, margin-top 0.4s ease;
    margin-top: 0;
  }

  .collection-card.open .subcategories {
    max-height: 500px;
    opacity: 1;
    margin-top: 28px;
  }

  .sub-divider {
    width: 30px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--gold);
    margin: 0 auto 24px;
  }

  .sub-list {
    list-style: none;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 10px;
    text-align: left;
  }

  .sub-list li a {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    padding: 12px 14px;
    background: var(--cream);
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    color: var(--ink);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
  }

  .sub-list li a::before {
    content: '✦';
    color: var(--gold);
    font-size: 10px;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  }

  .sub-list li a:hover {
    border-color: var(--gold);
    background: var(--bone);
    color: var(--gold);
  }
  .sub-list li a:hover::before {
    transform: rotate(180deg);
  }

  .collection-link .chevron {
    display: inline-block;
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
    margin-left: 4px;
  }
  .collection-card.open .collection-link .chevron {
    transform: rotate(90deg);
  }

  /* Manifesto */
  .manifesto {
    text-align: center;
    background: var(--ink);
    color: var(--cream);
    position: relative;
  }

  .manifesto::before {
    content: '✦';
    display: block;
    color: var(--gold);
    font-size: 24px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .manifesto-text {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: clamp(22px, 5vw, 32px);
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.4;
    max-width: 700px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .manifesto-text strong {
    color: #c9a96e;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .signature {
    margin-top: 40px;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.4em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
  }

  /* Values */
  .values-grid {
    display: grid;
    gap: 40px;
    margin-top: 40px;
  }

  .value {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 0 12px;
  }

  .value-number {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .value h4 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .value p {
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    font-size: 14px;
  }

  /* Footer */
  footer {
    background: var(--cream-deep);
    padding: 60px 24px 30px;
    text-align: center;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.2);
  }

  .footer-logo {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .footer-logo span { color: var(--gold); font-style: italic; }

  .footer-tag {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }

  .footer-links {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  .footer-links a {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.3);
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    font-size: 18px;
  }
  .footer-links a:hover {
    border-color: var(--gold);
    color: var(--gold);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.2);
  }
  .footer-nav {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 24px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .footer-nav a {
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .footer-nav a:hover { color: var(--gold); }

  .footer-divider {
    width: 40px;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--gold);
    margin: 0 auto 24px;
  }

  .copyright {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  }

  /* Animations */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  /* Scroll reveal — visible by default so content never disappears if JS fails */
  .reveal {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
    transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
  }
  .js-reveal .reveal:not(.in-view) {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(30px);
  }
  .js-reveal .reveal.in-view {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .reveal { opacity: 1 !important; transform: none !important; }
  }

  /* Tablet & desktop */
  @media (min-width: 720px) {
    .collection-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    }
    .values-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    }
    .cta-group {
      max-width: 560px;
    }
  }

  /* Boutique / products */
  .shop {
    padding: 80px 24px 100px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }
  .shop-filters {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
  }
  .shop-filter {
    background: var(--bone);
    border: 1px solid rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.25);
    padding: 8px 18px;
    font-family: inherit;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.25s;
  }
  .shop-filter:hover,
  .shop-filter.active {
    background: var(--ink);
    color: var(--cream);
    border-color: var(--ink);
  }
  .product-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr));
    gap: 24px;
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .product-card {
    background: var(--bone);
    border: 1px solid rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.15);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
  }
  .product-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(43, 38, 32, 0.1);
  }
  .product-visual {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 3 / 4;
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--cream-deep), var(--sand));
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 3rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .product-visual .product-photo {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center center;
  }
  .product-visual .product-emoji-fallback {
    font-size: 3rem;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 0;
  }
  .product-out {
    position: absolute;
    top: 12px;
    right: 12px;
    background: var(--ink);
    color: var(--cream);
    font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 4px 10px;
  }
  .product-body {
    padding: 20px 20px 16px;
    background: var(--bone);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
  .product-body-actions {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 10px;
  }
  .product-cat {
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .product-name {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .product-price {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
  }
  .product-actions {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 12px;
    right: 12px;
    z-index: 2;
  }
  .btn-save {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    padding: 0;
    cursor: pointer;
    opacity: 1;
    color: #e8e2d6;
    line-height: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 2px rgba(43, 38, 32, 0.55));
    transition: color 0.2s, transform 0.2s, filter 0.2s;
  }
  .product-heart-svg {
    width: 22px;
    height: 22px;
    display: block;
  }
  .btn-save.saved { color: var(--gold); }
  .btn-save:not(.saved):hover { color: #fff; transform: scale(1.1); }
  .btn-save.saved:hover { transform: scale(1.1); }
  .btn-cart-add {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    padding: 0;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    transition: transform 0.2s, color 0.2s, opacity 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-cart-add:hover:not(:disabled) {
    transform: scale(1.1);
    color: var(--gold);
  }
  .btn-cart-add.in-cart { color: var(--ink); opacity: 1; }
  .btn-cart-add:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
  }
  .product-cart-svg {
    width: 22px;
    height: 22px;
    display: block;
  }
  .nav-icon-btn { position: relative; }
  .nav-cart-badge {
    position: absolute;
    top: 2px;
    right: 0;
    min-width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    padding: 0 4px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: var(--ink);
    color: var(--cream);
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 16px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .shop-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    font-size: 14px;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
    padding: 48px;
  }
  .shop-active-filter {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin: -16px 0 24px;
  }
  .sub-shop-link { cursor: pointer; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="md3-site-header"></div>

<!-- Hero -->
<section id="md3-hero" class="hero-elegant" aria-label="MD3 Scandi">
  <div class="hero-bg" aria-hidden="true">
    <picture>
      <source srcset="images/hero-bg.webp?v=2" type="image/webp" />
      <img class="hero-bg-img" src="images/hero-bg.jpeg?v=2" alt="MD3 Scandi collection hero" width="3840" height="5766" decoding="async" fetchpriority="high" />
    </picture>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-gradient" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  <div class="hero-content hero-content--left">
    <div class="hero-copy">
      <h1 class="hero-headline" data-i18n="hero-subtitle">Your world,<br>elevated</h1>
      <a href="#boutique" class="btn-elegant luxury-button" data-i18n="hero-cta-shop">Discover the collection</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Featured -->
<section class="featured-collection" id="boutique">
  <h2 class="featured-title reveal" data-i18n="featured-title">New Collection</h2>
  <div class="product-grid reveal" id="featuredGrid"></div>
  <p class="shop-empty-state reveal" id="featuredEmpty" hidden data-i18n="featured-empty">Aucun produit en vedette pour le moment.</p>
</section>

<!-- Collections -->
<section class="collections" id="collections">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow reveal">
      <span class="line"></span>
      <a href="boutique.html" class="section-eyebrow-link" data-i18n="sec-univers-eyebrow">Tout voir</a>
      <span class="line"></span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal"><span data-i18n="sec-univers-a">L'art de </span><em data-i18n="sec-univers-b">vivre beau</em></h2>

    <div class="collection-grid">
      <div class="collection-card collection-card--fashion reveal">
        <div class="collection-card-inner">
          <h3 data-i18n="mode-title">Mode</h3>
          <p data-i18n="mode-desc">Des silhouettes pensées pour celles qui aiment la simplicité travaillée. Coupes nettes, matières nobles, intemporalité.</p>
          <a href="boutique.html?cat=Mode" class="collection-link"><span data-i18n="explore">Explorer</span> →</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="collection-card collection-card--maison reveal">
        <span class="collection-icon">🏠</span>
        <h3 data-i18n="maison-title">Maison</h3>
        <p data-i18n="maison-desc">L'art de l'intérieur scandinave. Lignes épurées, bois clair, textures douces. Une maison qui respire.</p>
        <a href="boutique.html?cat=Maison" class="collection-link"><span data-i18n="explore">Explorer</span> →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="collection-card collection-card--lifestyle reveal">
        <span class="collection-icon">✦</span>
        <h3 data-i18n="lifestyle-title">Lifestyle</h3>
        <p data-i18n="lifestyle-desc">Au-delà des objets — un état d'esprit. Le hygge, le luxe discret, le quotidien magnifié.</p>
        <a href="boutique.html?cat=Lifestyle" class="collection-link"><span data-i18n="explore">Explorer</span> →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="collection-card collection-card--limited reveal">
        <span class="collection-icon">✿</span>
        <h3 data-i18n="limited-title">Édition limitée</h3>
        <p data-i18n="limited-desc">Des pièces rares, en quantité limitée, pour ceux qui cherchent l'exception au quotidien.</p>
        <a href="boutique.html?cat=%C3%89dition%20limit%C3%A9e" class="collection-link"><span data-i18n="explore">Explorer</span> →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Manifesto -->
<section class="manifesto" id="manifesto">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="manifesto-text reveal" data-i18n="manifesto">
      « Nous croyons à <strong>l'élégance discrète</strong>, celle qui ne s'impose pas mais qui s'installe — dans une robe, dans une lampe, dans un geste. <em>MD3 Scandi</em>, c'est l'art de transformer le quotidien en art de vivre. »
    </p>
    <div class="signature reveal" data-i18n="signature">— La maison MD3 Scandi</div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Values -->
<section>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow reveal">
      <span class="line"></span>
      <span data-i18n="values-eyebrow">Notre signature</span>
      <span class="line"></span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="section-title reveal"><span data-i18n="values-a">Trois </span><em data-i18n="values-b">principes</em></h2>

    <div class="values-grid">
      <div class="value reveal">
        <div class="value-number">— I —</div>
        <h4 data-i18n="val1-title">Épuré</h4>
        <p data-i18n="val1-desc">Moins, mais mieux. Chaque pièce est choisie pour durer, pour traverser les saisons sans jamais lasser.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="value reveal">
        <div class="value-number">— II —</div>
        <h4 data-i18n="val2-title">Authentique</h4>
        <p data-i18n="val2-desc">Des matières vraies, des artisans réels. Pas de toc, pas d'effet de mode. Juste du beau, bien fait.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="value reveal">
        <div class="value-number">— III —</div>
        <h4 data-i18n="val3-title">Personnel</h4>
        <p data-i18n="val3-desc">Ton style, ton univers, ta maison. Nous ne dictons rien — nous proposons des pièces, à toi de composer.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Footer -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">MD3 <span>Scandi</span></div>
  <p class="footer-tag" data-i18n="footer-tag">Du dressing au salon</p>

  <div class="footer-nav">
    <a href="#boutique" data-i18n="footer-shop">Boutique</a>
    <a href="login.html" data-i18n="nav-login">Connexion</a>
    <a href="compte.html" data-i18n="nav-account">Mon compte</a>
    <a href="#" onclick="noopLink(event)" data-i18n="footer-about">À propos</a>
    <a href="mailto:info@md3scandi.com" data-i18n="footer-contact">Contact</a>
  </div>

  <!-- Icônes réseaux sociaux -->
  <div class="footer-links">
    <!-- Email -->
    <a href="mailto:info@md3scandi.com" aria-label="Email">

      <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M18 2h-3a5 5 0 0 0-5 5v3H7v4h3v8h4v-8h3l1-4h-4V7a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h3z"/></svg>

<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-app-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-auth-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-firestore-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-storage-compat.js"></script>
<script src="firebase-config.js"></script>
<script src="md3-firebase.js?v=4"></script>
<script src="md3-store.js?v=6"></script>
<script src="md3-site-assets.js?v=1"></script>
<script src="md3-auth.js?v=3"></script>
<script src="md3-nav-icons.js"></script>
<script src="md3-header.js?v=3"></script>
<script src="md3-lang.js?v=9"></script>
<script src="md3-currency.js?v=4"></script>
<script src="md3-hero-fit.js"></script>
<script src="md3-shop-render.js?v=6"></script>
<script>
  function updateCartBadge() {
    MD3Header.updateCartBadge();
  }
  document.documentElement.classList.add('js-reveal');

  function initReveal() {
    const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
    if (!reveals.length) return;
    if (typeof IntersectionObserver === 'undefined') {
      reveals.forEach(el => el.classList.add('in-view'));
      return;
    }
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) entry.target.classList.add('in-view');
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.08, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
    reveals.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      reveals.forEach(el => {
        const r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
        if (r.top < window.innerHeight * 0.92) el.classList.add('in-view');
      });
    });
  }
  initReveal();

  function shopLabel(key) { return MD3Lang.t(key); }

  MD3Lang.init({
    onChange() {
      MD3Currency.refreshCurrency();
      MD3Lang.refreshUI();
      updateNavAuth();
      try { renderFeatured(); } catch (e) { console.error('renderFeatured', e); }
      updateCartBadge();
      if (window.MD3HeroFit) MD3HeroFit.fit();
    }
  });

  function noopLink(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
  }

  function toggleSub(e, link) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const card = link.closest('.collection-card');
    card.classList.toggle('open');
  }

  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(link => {
    link.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      const href = link.getAttribute('href');
      if (!href || href === '#') return;
      const target = document.querySelector(href);
      if (target) {
        e.preventDefault();
        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
      }
    });
  });

  /* Featured products */
  function renderFeatured() {
    const products = MD3Store.getHomeFeaturedProducts();
    const grid = document.getElementById('featuredGrid');
    const empty = document.getElementById('featuredEmpty');
    if (!grid) return;

    if (!products.length) {
      grid.innerHTML = '';
      if (empty) empty.hidden = false;
      return;
    }
    if (empty) empty.hidden = true;
    MD3Shop.renderGrid(grid, products, MD3Shop.minimalLabels());
    updateCartBadge();
  }

  function updateNavAuth() {
    MD3Header.updateAuth();
  }

  function bootShop() {
    updateNavAuth();
    try { renderFeatured(); } catch (e) { console.error('renderFeatured', e); }
  }

  MD3Store.init().then(function () {
    if (window.MD3SiteAssets) MD3SiteAssets.init();
    bootShop();
  }).catch(function (e) {
    console.error('MD3Store.init', e);
    bootShop();
  });

  window.addEventListener('pageshow', function () {
    updateNavAuth();
    updateCartBadge();
    try { renderFeatured(); } catch (e) { console.error('renderFeatured', e); }
  });

  window.addEventListener('md3-products-updated', function () {
    try { renderFeatured(); } catch (e) { console.error('renderFeatured', e); }
  });

  window.addEventListener('md3-carts-updated', function () {
    updateCartBadge();
  });

  window.addEventListener('md3-session-changed', function () {
    updateNavAuth();
  });

  if (location.hash === '#boutique' || location.hash.startsWith('#boutique?')) {
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('boutique')?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }), 300);
  }

  window.addEventListener('storage', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'md3_products') renderFeatured();
    if (e.key === 'md3_carts') updateCartBadge();
    if (e.key === 'md3_session') updateNavAuth();
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<script src="md3-lang-boot.js"></script>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>MD3 Scandi — Boutique</title>
<link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 viewBox=%220 0 100 100%22><text y=%22.9em%22 font-size=%2290%22>✦</text></svg>" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;1,300&family=Cinzel:wght@400;500&family=Jost:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Noto+Sans+Arabic:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="md3-header.css?v=5" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="md3-shop.css?v=4" />
<style>
  body { font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif; background: #f5f0e8; color: #1a1816; min-height: 100vh; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="md3-site-header"></div>

<section class="boutique-page">
  <div class="boutique-hero">
    <h1 id="boutiqueTitle">Boutique</h1>
    <p id="boutiqueCount"></p>
  </div>
  <div class="boutique-filters" id="boutiqueFilters" hidden></div>
  <div class="sgrid" id="boutiqueGrid"></div>
  <p class="shop-empty-state" id="boutiqueEmpty" hidden></p>
</section>

<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-app-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-auth-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-firestore-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-storage-compat.js"></script>
<script src="firebase-config.js"></script>
<script src="md3-firebase.js?v=3"></script>
<script src="md3-store.js?v=5"></script>
<script src="md3-auth.js?v=3"></script>
<script src="md3-nav-icons.js"></script>
<script src="md3-header.js?v=3"></script>
<script src="md3-lang.js?v=5"></script>
<script src="md3-currency.js?v=4"></script>
<script src="md3-shop-render.js?v=4"></script>
<script>
  const L = (k) => MD3Lang.t(k);
  let catFilter = null;
  let subFilter = null;

  function readParams() {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
    catFilter = params.get('cat') || null;
    subFilter = params.get('sub') || null;
  }

  function setSub(sub) {
    subFilter = sub || null;
    const url = new URL(location.href);
    if (subFilter) url.searchParams.set('sub', subFilter);
    else url.searchParams.delete('sub');
    history.replaceState(null, '', url.pathname + url.search);
    renderBoutique();
  }

  function renderBoutique() {
    readParams();
    const canonicalCat = (cat) =>
      MD3Store.canonicalCategory ? MD3Store.canonicalCategory(cat) : cat;
    const activeCat = catFilter ? canonicalCat(catFilter) : null;
    let products = MD3Store.getProducts();
    if (activeCat) products = products.filter((p) => canonicalCat(p.category) === activeCat);
    if (subFilter) products = products.filter((p) => p.sub === subFilter);

    const titleEl = document.getElementById('boutiqueTitle');
    const countEl = document.getElementById('boutiqueCount');
    const grid = document.getElementById('boutiqueGrid');
    const empty = document.getElementById('boutiqueEmpty');
    const filtersEl = document.getElementById('boutiqueFilters');

    if (activeCat) {
      titleEl.textContent = MD3Lang.translateCategory(activeCat);
      document.title = 'MD3 Scandi — ' + titleEl.textContent;
    } else {
      titleEl.textContent = L('shop-eyebrow');
      document.title = 'MD3 Scandi — Boutique';
    }

    const n = products.length;
    countEl.textContent = n === 1
      ? L('boutique-count-one')
      : L('boutique-count').replace('%n', String(n));

    if (activeCat && !subFilter) {
      const subs = [...new Set(MD3Store.getProducts().filter((p) => canonicalCat(p.category) === activeCat).map((p) => p.sub))].filter(Boolean);
      if (subs.length > 1) {
        filtersEl.hidden = false;
        filtersEl.innerHTML = [
          `<button type="button" class="boutique-filter active" onclick="setSub(null)">${L('shop-all')}</button>`,
          ...subs.map((s) => `<button type="button" class="boutique-filter" onclick="setSub('${s.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}')">${MD3Shop.esc(MD3Lang.translateSub(s))}</button>`),
        ].join('');
      } else {
        filtersEl.hidden = true;
        filtersEl.innerHTML = '';
      }
    } else if (activeCat && subFilter) {
      filtersEl.hidden = false;
      const subs = [...new Set(MD3Store.getProducts().filter((p) => canonicalCat(p.category) === activeCat).map((p) => p.sub))].filter(Boolean);
      filtersEl.innerHTML = [
        `<button type="button" class="boutique-filter" onclick="setSub(null)">${L('shop-all')}</button>`,
        ...subs.map((s) => {
          const active = s === subFilter ? ' active' : '';
          return `<button type="button" class="boutique-filter${active}" onclick="setSub('${s.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}')">${MD3Shop.esc(MD3Lang.translateSub(s))}</button>`;
        }),
      ].join('');
    } else {
      filtersEl.hidden = true;
      filtersEl.innerHTML = '';
    }

    if (!n) {
      grid.innerHTML = '';
      empty.hidden = false;
      empty.textContent = L('shop-empty-filter');
      return;
    }
    empty.hidden = true;
    MD3Shop.renderGrid(grid, products);
  }

  function boot() {
    renderBoutique();
    MD3Header.updateCartBadge();
    MD3Header.updateAuth();
  }

  window.setSub = setSub;
  MD3Lang.init({
    onChange() {
      if (typeof MD3Currency !== 'undefined') MD3Currency.refreshCurrency();
      MD3Lang.refreshUI();
      boot();
    },
  });
  MD3Store.init().then(boot).catch(boot);
  window.addEventListener('md3-products-updated', renderBoutique);
  window.addEventListener('md3-carts-updated', () => MD3Header.updateCartBadge());
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<script src="md3-lang-boot.js"></script>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>MD3 Scandi — Produit</title>
<link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 viewBox=%220 0 100 100%22><text y=%22.9em%22 font-size=%2290%22>✦</text></svg>" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;1,300&family=Cinzel:wght@400;500&family=Jost:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Noto+Sans+Arabic:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="md3-header.css?v=5" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="md3-shop.css?v=12" />
<style>
  body { font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif; background: #f5f0e8; color: #1a1816; min-height: 100vh; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="md3-site-header"></div>

<button type="button" class="product-back" onclick="history.back()">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="15 18 9 12 15 6"/></svg>
  <span data-i18n="btn-back">Retour</span>
</button>

<main class="product-page-wrap" id="productWrap">
  <p class="shop-empty-state" style="grid-column:1/-1" data-i18n="product-loading">Chargement…</p>
</main>

<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-app-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-auth-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-firestore-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-storage-compat.js"></script>
<script src="firebase-config.js"></script>
<script src="md3-firebase.js?v=3"></script>
<script src="md3-store.js?v=5"></script>
<script src="md3-auth.js?v=3"></script>
<script src="md3-nav-icons.js"></script>
<script src="md3-header.js?v=3"></script>
<script src="md3-lang.js?v=5"></script>
<script src="md3-currency.js?v=4"></script>
<script src="md3-shop-render.js?v=4"></script>
<script>
  let qty = 1;
  let currentProductImages = [];
  let currentProductImageIndex = 0;
  let currentProductStock = 0;
  const L = (k) => MD3Lang.t(k);
  const cartSvg = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M6 2L3 6v14a2 2 0 002 2h14a2 2 0 002-2V6l-3-4z"/><line x1="3" y1="6" x2="21" y2="6"/><path d="M16 10a4 4 0 01-8 0"/></svg>';

  function setQty(n) {
    const msg = document.getElementById('productQtyMsg');
    const max = Math.max(1, Number(currentProductStock) || 1);
    if (n > max) {
      qty = max;
      if (msg) {
        msg.textContent = L('product-last-item');
        msg.hidden = false;
      }
    } else {
      qty = Math.max(1, n);
      if (msg) msg.hidden = true;
    }
    const el = document.getElementById('productQty');
    if (el) el.textContent = qty;
  }

  async function addProductToCart(id) {
    const p = MD3Store.getProductById(id);
    if (!p || !p.stock) return;
    let added = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < qty; i++) {
      const res = await MD3Store.addToCart(id);
      if (!res.ok) {
        if (res.reason === 'out') MD3Shop.showToast(L('cart-out-stock'));
        else if (res.reason === 'max') MD3Shop.showToast(L('cart-max-stock'));
        break;
      }
      added++;
    }
    if (added > 0) {
      MD3Header.updateCartBadge();
      MD3Shop.showToast(L('cart-added-qty').replace('%n', String(added)));
    }
  }

  function renderProduct() {
    const params = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
    const id = params.get('id');
    const wrap = document.getElementById('productWrap');
    const p = MD3Store.getProductById(id);
    if (!p) {
      wrap.innerHTML = `<p class="shop-empty-state" style="grid-column:1/-1">${L('product-not-found')}</p>`;
      return;
    }
    document.title = 'MD3 Scandi — ' + p.name;
    const out = !p.stock;
    currentProductStock = Number(p.stock) || 0;
    qty = 1;
    const images = MD3Store.normalizeProductImages ? MD3Store.normalizeProductImages(p) : (p.image ? [p.image] : []);
    currentProductImages = images;
    currentProductImageIndex = 0;
    const img = images[0]
      ? `<img src="${MD3Shop.esc(images[0])}" alt="" class="product-photo" id="productMainPhoto" />`
      : `<div class="product-ebig">${MD3Shop.esc(p.emoji || '✦')}</div>`;
    const thumbs = images.length > 1
      ? `<div class="product-thumbs">${images.map((src, idx) => `
          <button type="button" class="product-thumb-btn${idx === 0 ? ' active' : ''}" onclick="setProductPhoto(${idx})">
            <img src="${MD3Shop.esc(src)}" alt="" />
          </button>`).join('')}</div>`
      : '';
    const arrows = images.length > 1
      ? `<button type="button" class="product-gallery-arrow product-gallery-prev" id="productGalleryPrev" onclick="navigateProductPhoto(-1)">&lt;</button>
         <button type="button" class="product-gallery-arrow product-gallery-next" id="productGalleryNext" onclick="navigateProductPhoto(1)">&gt;</button>`
      : '';
    const catLine = [MD3Lang.translateCategory(p.category), MD3Lang.translateSub(p.sub)].filter(Boolean).join(' · ');
    const desc = p.desc || L('product-desc-fallback').replace('%s', p.name);

    wrap.innerHTML = `
      <div class="product-gallery">
        <div class="product-ibox">${img}${arrows}${thumbs}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="product-info">
        ${catLine ? `<div class="product-pcat">${MD3Shop.esc(catLine)}</div>` : ''}
        <h1 class="product-ptitle">${MD3Shop.esc(p.name)}</h1>
        <div class="product-ppr">
          <span class="product-pp">${MD3Currency.formatPrice(p.price)}</span>
          <span class="product-ppn">${L('price-incl')}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="product-pstk ${out ? 'out' : 'in'}">${out ? L('stock-out-lbl') : L('stock-in')}</div>
        <p class="product-pdesc">${MD3Shop.esc(desc)}</p>
        <div class="product-qrow">
          <span class="product-qlbl">${L('label-qty')}</span>
          <div class="product-qctl">
            <button type="button" class="product-qb" onclick="setQty(qty - 1)">−</button>
            <span class="product-qn" id="productQty">1</span>
            <button type="button" class="product-qb" onclick="setQty(qty + 1)">+</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <p class="product-qmsg" id="productQtyMsg" hidden></p>
        <button type="button" class="product-btn-add" ${out ? 'disabled' : ''} onclick="addProductToCart(${p.id})">
          ${cartSvg}${L('cart-add')}
        </button>
      </div>`;
  }

  function refreshProductGalleryControls() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.product-thumb-btn').forEach((el, idx) => {
      el.classList.toggle('active', idx === currentProductImageIndex);
    });
    const prev = document.getElementById('productGalleryPrev');
    const next = document.getElementById('productGalleryNext');
    if (prev) prev.hidden = currentProductImages.length <= 1;
    if (next) next.hidden = currentProductImages.length <= 1;
  }

  function setProductPhoto(index) {
    const img = document.getElementById('productMainPhoto');
    const src = currentProductImages[index];
    if (!src) return;
    currentProductImageIndex = index;
    if (img) img.src = src;
    refreshProductGalleryControls();
  }

  function navigateProductPhoto(delta) {
    const total = currentProductImages.length;
    if (total <= 1) return;
    const nextIndex = (currentProductImageIndex + delta + total) % total;
    setProductPhoto(nextIndex);
  }

  window.setProductPhoto = setProductPhoto;
  window.navigateProductPhoto = navigateProductPhoto;

  function boot() {
    renderProduct();
    MD3Header.updateCartBadge();
    MD3Header.updateAuth();
  }

  MD3Lang.init({
    onChange() {
      if (typeof MD3Currency !== 'undefined') MD3Currency.refreshCurrency();
      MD3Lang.refreshUI();
      boot();
    },
  });
  MD3Store.init().then(boot).catch(boot);
  window.addEventListener('md3-products-updated', renderProduct);
  window.addEventListener('md3-carts-updated', () => MD3Header.updateCartBadge());
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<script src="md3-lang-boot.js"></script>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>MD3 Scandi — Panier</title>
<meta name="description" content="Votre panier MD3 Scandi." />
<link rel="canonical" href="https://md3scandi.com/cart.html" />
<link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 viewBox=%220 0 100 100%22><text y=%22.9em%22 font-size=%2290%22>✦</text></svg>" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300;1,400&family=Cinzel:wght@400;500&family=Jost:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="md3-header.css?v=5" />
<style>
  :root {
    --cream: #f5f0e8;
    --cream-deep: #ebe3d5;
    --sand: #d9cdb6;
    --bone: #ffffff;
    --ink: #2b2620;
    --ink-soft: #5a5247;
    --gold: #b8935a;
    --danger: #c0392b;
    --shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(43, 38, 32, 0.04), 0 8px 24px rgba(43, 38, 32, 0.06);
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  body {
    font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--ink);
    background: var(--cream);
    line-height: 1.6;
    min-height: 100vh;
  }
  main {
    max-width: 720px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 48px 24px 80px;
  }
  .cart-eyebrow {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.3em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
  }
  .cart-eyebrow .line { width: 32px; height: 1px; background: var(--gold); }
  h1 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 2.75rem);
    font-weight: 300;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
  }
  .cart-empty {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 48px 24px;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    font-size: 15px;
  }
  .cart-empty a {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 24px;
    padding: 14px 28px;
    background: var(--ink);
    color: var(--cream);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .cart-empty a:hover { background: var(--gold); }
  .cart-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
  .cart-item {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 88px 1fr auto;
    gap: 16px;
    align-items: center;
    background: var(--bone);
    border: 1px solid rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.15);
    padding: 16px;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
  }
  .cart-item-visual {
    width: 88px;
    height: 88px;
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--cream-deep), var(--sand));
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
  }
  .cart-item-visual img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center center;
  }
  .cart-item-visual span { font-size: 2rem; }
  .cart-item-name {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .cart-item-meta {
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .cart-item-price { font-size: 14px; color: var(--ink-soft); }
  .cart-item-actions {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: flex-end;
  }
  .qty-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
  }
  .qty-btn {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.35);
    background: var(--cream);
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1;
    color: var(--ink);
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .qty-btn:hover { border-color: var(--gold); }
  .qty-val { min-width: 20px; text-align: center; font-weight: 500; color: var(--ink); }
  .cart-summary {
    margin-top: 32px;
    padding-top: 24px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.25);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .cart-total-row {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
  }
  .cart-total-row span { color: var(--ink-soft); font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-right: 12px; }
  .btn-continue,
  .btn-checkout {
    padding: 14px 28px;
    background: var(--ink);
    color: var(--cream);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: background 0.3s;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: inherit;
  }
  .btn-continue:hover,
  .btn-checkout:hover { background: var(--gold); }
  @media (max-width: 520px) {
    .cart-item { grid-template-columns: 72px 1fr; }
    .cart-item-actions { grid-column: 1 / -1; flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
  }
  .modal-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(43, 38, 32, 0.55);
    z-index: 200;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 1rem;
  }
  .modal-overlay.open { display: flex; }
  .modal {
    background: var(--bone);
    border: 1px solid rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.2);
    padding: 2rem;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 380px;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
  }
  .confirm-modal { text-align: center; }
  .confirm-modal h2 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 300;
    margin-top: 1rem;
  }
  .confirm-modal p { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--ink-soft); margin: 0.75rem 0 0; }
  .modal-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
    padding-top: 1.25rem;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.2);
  }
  .btn-cancel {
    background: none;
    border: 1px solid rgba(184, 147, 90, 0.35);
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    padding: 0.65rem 1.25rem;
    font-family: inherit;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .btn-cancel:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }
  .btn-confirm {
    background: var(--ink);
    color: var(--cream);
    border: none;
    padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem;
    font-family: inherit;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .btn-confirm:hover { background: var(--gold); }
</style>
</head>
<body data-meta-title="meta-title-cart" data-meta-desc="meta-desc-cart">

<div id="md3-site-header"></div>

<main>
  <div class="cart-eyebrow">
    <span class="line"></span>
    <span data-i18n="nav-cart">Panier</span>
    <span class="line"></span>
  </div>
  <h1 data-i18n="cart-title">Mon panier</h1>
  <div id="cartContent"></div>
</main>

<div class="modal-overlay" id="confirmModal">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="confirm-modal">
      <div style="font-size:2rem;" id="confirmIcon">🛒</div>
      <h2 id="confirmTitle"></h2>
      <p id="confirmText"></p>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" id="confirmCancelBtn"><span data-i18n="btn-cancel">Annuler</span></button>
      <button type="button" class="btn-confirm" id="confirmBtn"><span data-i18n="confirm-title">Confirmer</span></button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-app-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-auth-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-firestore-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.8.0/firebase-storage-compat.js"></script>
<script src="firebase-config.js"></script>
<script src="md3-firebase.js?v=3"></script>
<script src="md3-store.js?v=5"></script>
<script src="md3-auth.js?v=3"></script>
<script src="md3-nav-icons.js"></script>
<script src="md3-header.js?v=3"></script>
<script src="md3-lang.js?v=5"></script>
<script src="md3-currency.js?v=4"></script>
<script>
(function () {
  const S = MD3Store;
  const t = (k) => MD3Lang.t(k);

  function setNavAuth() {
    MD3Header.updateAuth();
  }

  function updateCartBadge() {
    MD3Header.updateCartBadge();
  }

  function esc(s) {
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.textContent = s;
    return d.innerHTML;
  }

  function renderCart() {
    MD3Currency.refreshCurrency();
    const lines = S.getCartLines();
    const el = document.getElementById('cartContent');
    if (!lines.length) {
      el.innerHTML = `<div class="cart-empty">
        <p data-i18n="cart-empty">Votre panier est vide.</p>
        <a href="index.html#boutique" data-i18n="cart-continue">Continuer mes achats</a>
      </div>`;
      MD3Lang.refreshUI();
      return;
    }
    let total = 0;
    el.innerHTML = `<div class="cart-list">${lines.map(({ product: p, qty }) => {
      total += p.price * qty;
      const cat = MD3Lang.translateCategory(p.category);
      const sub = MD3Lang.translateSub(p.sub);
      return `<article class="cart-item" data-id="${p.id}">
        <div class="cart-item-visual">${S.productVisualInner(p)}</div>
        <div>
          <div class="cart-item-meta">${esc(cat)} · ${esc(sub)}</div>
          <h2 class="cart-item-name">${esc(p.name)}</h2>
          <p class="cart-item-price">${MD3Currency.formatPrice(p.price)}</p>
        </div>
        <div class="cart-item-actions">
          <div class="qty-row">
            <span>${t('cart-qty')}</span>
            <button type="button" class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty(${p.id}, -1)" aria-label="-">−</button>
            <span class="qty-val" id="qty-${p.id}">${qty}</span>
            <button type="button" class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty(${p.id}, 1)" aria-label="+">+</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>`;
    }).join('')}</div>
    <div class="cart-summary">
      <p class="cart-total-row"><span data-i18n="cart-total">Total</span>${MD3Currency.formatPrice(total)}</p>
      <a href="checkout.html" class="btn-checkout" data-i18n="cart-checkout">Checkout</a>
    </div>`;
    MD3Lang.refreshUI();
  }

  function openConfirmModal(title, text, icon, onConfirm) {
    document.getElementById('confirmTitle').textContent = title;
    document.getElementById('confirmText').textContent = text;
    document.getElementById('confirmIcon').textContent = icon;
    document.getElementById('confirmBtn').onclick = () => {
      onConfirm();
      closeConfirmModal();
    };
    document.getElementById('confirmModal').classList.add('open');
  }

  function closeConfirmModal() {
    document.getElementById('confirmModal').classList.remove('open');
  }
  window.closeConfirmModal = closeConfirmModal;

  document.getElementById('confirmCancelBtn').addEventListener('click', closeConfirmModal);

  window.confirmRemoveFromCart = function (id) {
    const p = S.getProducts().find((x) => x.id === id);
    const text = p
      ? t('confirm-cart-remove-named').replace('%s', p.name)
      : t('confirm-cart-remove-text');
    openConfirmModal(t('confirm-cart-remove-title'), text, '🛒', () => {
      removeLine(id).catch(function (e) {
        console.error('removeFromCart', e);
      });
    });
  };

  window.changeQty = async function (id, delta) {
    const lines = S.getCartLines();
    const line = lines.find((l) => l.product.id === id);
    if (!line) return;
    const next = line.qty + delta;
    if (next <= 0) {
      confirmRemoveFromCart(id);
      return;
    }
    const res = await S.setCartQty(id, next);
    if (!res.ok && delta > 0) alert(t('cart-max-stock'));
    renderCart();
    updateCartBadge();
  };

  async function removeLine(id) {
    try {
      await S.removeFromCart(id);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('removeFromCart', e);
    }
    renderCart();
    updateCartBadge();
  }

  document.getElementById('confirmModal').addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    if (e.target === this) closeConfirmModal();
  });

  MD3Lang.init({
    onChange() {
      MD3Currency.refreshCurrency();
      MD3Lang.refreshUI();
      setNavAuth(S.getCurrentUser());
      renderCart();
    }
  });

  function bootCart() {
    setNavAuth(S.getCurrentUser());
    renderCart();
  }

  MD3Store.init().then(bootCart).catch(function (e) {
    console.error('MD3Store.init', e);
    bootCart();
  });

  window.addEventListener('pageshow', function () {
    setNavAuth(S.getCurrentUser());
    renderCart();
  });

  window.addEventListener('md3-products-updated', function () {
    renderCart();
  });

  window.addEventListener('md3-carts-updated', function () {
    renderCart();
    updateCartBadge();
  });

  window.addEventListener('md3-session-changed', function () {
    setNavAuth(S.getCurrentUser());
    renderCart();
  });

  window.addEventListener('storage', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'md3_carts' || e.key === 'md3_products') {
      renderCart();
      updateCartBadge();
    }
  });
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
